The camera then shifts to a dynamic view of the production line, showing golden-yellow fish strips moving along a metal mesh conveyor, indicating a cooked or seasoned stage. The strips are shown being transported through a drying tunnel, with a close-up of a temperature gauge reading around 40°C, emphasizing controlled processing. The inspectors continue their quality check, holding a tray of fish strips and comparing them to those on the conveyor. The setting is an industrial food processing facility with stainless steel machinery, dim lighting, and a focus on hygiene, as both inspectors wear face masks and hairnets. The camera captures the movement of the strips through the system, highlighting the automated and precise nature of the production. The inspectors’ gestures suggest a detailed evaluation of texture, color, and consistency, reinforcing the quality control aspect of the process.
